---
title: "Organisation"
---

<!-- TODO: add links to each person's landing page -->

GISRUK2026 is hosted by the [School of Engineering](https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/about/college-of-engineering-and-physical-sciences/engineering) at the University of Birmingham. Our local organising committee is

- Emma Ferranti  
- Sarah Greenham
- Daniel Donaldson
- Simon Blainey
- Stephen Jones 
- Naya Desai
- Shukurat Bankole
- Harry Kirby
- Deanne Brettle
- Eugene McGee
- Nasrul Ghazali
- Ross Bangs 
- Shomart Healy
- Ruojing Zhang 
- Nicholas Cork 
- Tahmina Akter
